calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was called with Case No. PES-17-300894; the Estate of Anthony Silmon.

Appearances:
Jason Louie for Ray Silmon.

The Court addressed the issue raised in the Examiner's notes. Mr. Louie stated that it was mostly an administrative error. The Court stated that it caused more work, that Mr. Louie absorbed it all, and that we've made the correction. Mr. Louie stated that he had the replacement order for the Anthony Silmon matter (300894) with him and submitted it in open court. The Court then granted the Petition for Final Distribution in case no. PES-17-300894 and granted the Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account in case no. PES-17-300895 (subject to review of both of the orders).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Matter Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
